name: 脉冲手枪
description: 敌人释放技能时，对5×5范围内随机一个敌人造成等同于自身攻击力的伤害
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.rulePiece; var enemy = context.sourcePiece; if (!caster) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } if (!enemy) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } if (enemy.ownerPlayerId === caster.ownerPlayerId) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } var dx = Math.abs(enemy.x - caster.x); var dy = Math.abs(enemy.y - caster.y); if (Math.max(dx, dy) > 2) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } var enemies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId !== caster.ownerPlayerId && p.currentHp > 0 && Math.max(Math.abs(p.x - caster.x), Math.abs(p.y - caster.y)) <= 2; }); if (enemies.length === 0) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } var target = enemies[Math.floor(Math.random() * enemies.length)]; var result = dealDamage(caster, target, caster.attack, 'physical', battle, 'pulse-pistol'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '的脉冲手枪触发，对' + target.name + '造成' + result.damage + '点伤害' }; }
